title: Happy path — cotton bulk
description: Standard bulk cotton order. Buyer secure-supply intent at moderate budget; seller fill-capacity intent. Both balanced styles. No advisor blocks. Expected to close in 2–3 rounds.

expectedOutcome.likely: Closes ₹370–₹390/unit in 2–3 rounds. Total deal ~₹37–39M. ACTUS PAM simulation succeeds. Full audit chain.
expectedOutcome.possible: Escalates to human procurement officer if Gemini rate-limits and rule-based fallback hits a sticky threshold.
expectedOutcome.failureMode: If buyer's opening anchor lands too low, may take all 3 rounds without bridging gap.

declaredButDeferred: sellerIntent (entirely — seller acts on its own .env config)
